description_long: This modern bungalow features a two-story structure with a dark gray hip roof and a sleek, geometric facade. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of smooth gray and white surfaces, complemented by large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light. The front of the house includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery and palm trees. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a small lawn, all enclosed by a high privacy wall. The property also includes a side garden and a dedicated parking area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a garage, all enclosed by a privacy wall.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard with a pool, patio, and green lawn, as well as the back facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, multiple palm trees, and the side garden area.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, paved driveway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, additional windows, and the rear pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on all sides
